title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-17
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Garden census day
gist.blurb: The greenhouse clipboard got its daily shuffle. App metrics and health checks are freshly counted, because even digital gardens need someone to check the leaves.
gist.summary: Updated the daily app metrics, health-check records, and greenhouse listing in apps/APPS.md and apps/GREENHOUSE.md for 2026-07-17.
gist.impact: Community maintainers have refreshed visibility into app activity and greenhouse health without changing the apps themselves.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy greenhouse maintenance scene: Polly wears a tiny gardener hat and checks a clipboard beside code-plants with small health-status blossoms, while a CRT monitor robot eagerly displays updated app charts. This represents routine community app monitoring and a tended digital garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a warm community greenhouse where Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush and light blue wings, wears a tiny gardener hat and updates a clipboard beside blooming code-plants labeled with simple health check icons; a chunky CRT-monitor robot shows cheerful app metric bars. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, subtle pixel-font text: 'GARDEN CHECK'.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a warm community greenhouse where Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush and light blue wings, wears a tiny gardener hat and updates a clipboard beside blooming code-plants labeled with simple health check icons; a chunky CRT-monitor robot shows cheerful app metric bars.
